name: BlueConch Technologies (Part of UST Global Inc.)
h1: BlueConch Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: BlueConch Technologies runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Ahmedabad and Pune, covering CoE and gbs, built over six years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BlueConch Technologies office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BlueConch Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BlueConch Technologies runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Ahmedabad, Pune), covering CoE and gbs. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: India Head Campus Recruitment & Early Careers

about.description: BlueConch Technologies's India footprint covers Ahmedabad and Pune, spanning CoE and gbs. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.
about.industry: IT, System Integration and Consulting Services, Corporate Services

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BlueConch Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BlueConch Technologies have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies's India GCC footprint spans Ahmedabad and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BlueConch Technologies run in India?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies runs CoE and gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BlueConch Technologies's India GCCs?
faq.a: BlueConch Technologies's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BlueConch Technologies's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 17 leaders at BlueConch Technologies's India centers, across Finance and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
